subject: Detailed product quote request
body:
Hi, please send a detailed quote. We have a procurement budget next month.

Director Zhang

subject: Re: Detailed product quote request
body: Received the quote. Would like to schedule a demo for Wednesday afternoon.

subject: Learning about your product
body: Saw your company online, would like to learn about the basic features.

subject: Urgent procurement need
body:
Hi, our current vendor had an issue and we urgently need a replacement within 2 weeks. Budget is $500K, need enterprise edition + implementation services.

Please contact me ASAP.

Director Wang

subject: Unsubscribe
body: Please remove me from the mailing list.
